{{Quote|Didn't we save your papa's ''shebs'' at Caluula Station? Ask him if he remembers the funny folks in armor who were killing the ''vongese'' for him. It might jog his memory. And tell him Carid sends his best.|[[Baltan Carid]], speaking to [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]]|<ref name="Legacy of the Force: Revelation">''[[Legacy of the Force: Revelation]]''</ref>}}
'''Caluula Station''' was a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] known for as a haven for [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] in need of spare parts and environmental scientists who came to study the world it orbited.

Officially under the auspices of the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic military]], Caluula Station came under heavy [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Battle of Caluula|assault]] after the disastrous [[Second Battle of Bilbringi|Operation Trinity]]. Because the nearby [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] [[HoloNet relay/Legends|relay stations]] were destroyed by the [[mabugat kan]], the station was unable to raise [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] reinforcements.

[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] arrival following his [[Battle of Selvaris|failed rescue mission]] to [[Selvaris]] brought further Yuuzhan Vong attention to the station. They employed a [[ychna]] to draw out Solo, which subsequently destroyed the station. Prior to its final moments, [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Garray]], the station's commanding officer, evacuated most of the facility staff to the surface of [[Caluula/Legends|Caluula]] where they prepared to defend against the Yuuzhan Vong invasion.
